No country in the world has won more Olympic medals in Judo than Brazil, with 24. So naturally, Brazilians are eagerly anticipating the sport at this summerâs Paris Games. Among the nationâs top contenders is Rafaela Silva, currently ranked fifth in the world in the women's under-57-kilogram category.  Lucrecia Franco has her story from Rio de Janeiro.
